title: diphryllum eschscholtzianum
intro: Diphryllum eschscholtzianum, also known as California feather moss, is a type of epiphytic plant that belongs to the family of mosses. Traditionally, Diphryllum eschscholtzianum has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Diphryllum eschscholtzianum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Diphryllum eschscholtzianum can be made by infusing the plant material in hot water to create a tea, or by using it in tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
